---
output: github_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# DMSTAr <img src="man/figures/DMSTAr_hexish.png" align="right" alt="" width="120" />

DMSTAr is a deterministic hydrology and phosphorous mass-balance engine replicating the VBA code semantics of the original Dynamic Model for Stormwater Treatment Areas (DMSTA). For complete details regarding DMSTA background and development see [DMSTA webpage](https://wwwalker.net/dmsta/) and relevant publications below. 

  * Kadlec RH, Wallace SD (2009) Treatment wetlands, 2nd edn. CRC Press, Boca Raton, FL

  * Walker WW, Kadlec RH (2011) Modeling Phosphorus Dynamics in Everglades Wetlands and Stormwater Treatment Areas. Critical Reviews in Environmental Science and Technology 41:430–446. doi: 10.1080/10643389.2010.531225


## Citing package

```{r, eval = TRUE}
citation('DMSTAr')
```

## Installation <a name="install"></a>

Development version can be installed from this repo using: 

```{r,eval = FALSE}
install.packages("devtools");# if you do not have it installed on your PC
devtools::install_github("SwampThingPaul/DMSTAr")
```

<!-- To install the deployed version from CRAN use: -->

```{r,eval = FALSE,  include=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
# install.packages("DMSTAr")
```


## *Indevelopment*

 * Develop Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) versions DMSTA functions
 
 * Develop calibration tools 
 
 * Include Low-P Wetland Event Model framework consistent with Juston and Kadlec (2019)
 
 * Develop flume and alum based models
